bullets: Once Placed 2nd in a Minecraft Local LAN Tournament
bio: Hello! I am a Computer Engineering student, my first video game i've ever played was Galaga on the Gameboy Advanced. Overwatch holds a special place in my heart not only for the competitive side, but the lore side as well! "Never accept the world as it appears to be, dare to see it for what it could be." - Dr. H Winston
